Marriott Bonvoy.notes: 5th night free applies only on standard/PointSavers award redemptions of 5+ consecutive nights at the same property. Not available on cash rates. Points Advance lets you hold the booking without full balance and top up later.

IHG One Rewards.notes: Platinum Elite and above earn the 4th-night-free on standard point redemptions of 4+ consecutive nights. Co-brand credit cards (IHG Premier/Traveler) confer Platinum status, making this widely accessible. Not available on cash bookings.

Hilton Honors.notes: Gold and Diamond members receive the 5th night free on standard point redemptions of 5+ consecutive nights at the same property. Hilton Aspire, Surpass, and Business cards grant Gold or Diamond automatically.

World of Hyatt.notes: Hyatt does not offer a free-night-on-N-nights mechanic. Value comes from low chart prices (Cat 1-4) and Globalist suite-upgrade awards. Off-peak/standard/peak pricing matters more than night count.

Accor Live Limitless.notes: Accor uses a fixed 2000 points = 40 EUR redemption ratio that behaves like cash credit on any rate. No free-night-on-N-nights mechanic. The fixed ratio makes valuation trivial: cpp is a constant.

Wyndham Rewards.notes: Flat 7.5K/15K/30K tiers per night regardless of cash rate. No bonus-night mechanic. Vacasa vacation rental redemptions also priced flat.

Choice Privileges.notes: No free-night mechanic. Sweet spots are Preferred Hotels affiliations at 8K-16K/night.

Best Western Rewards.notes: No bonus-night mechanic. Limited transferable-currency partnerships.

Radisson Rewards Americas.notes: Separate from Radisson Rewards EMEA since 2022. Thin redemption chart.
